nodes.context: Clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Tropea, Calabria, Italy.
Criminal and mafia-type organisation in Calabria, Italy.
Clan of the 'Ndrangheta, allied with Piserà 'ndrina.
Clan of the 'Ndrangheta from Tropea, rival of Piserà 'ndrina.
Clan of the 'Ndrangheta mentioned in 1984 operation.
Clan of the 'Ndrangheta mentioned in 1984 operation.
Clan of the 'Ndrangheta mentioned in 1984 operation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Piserà 'ndrina are a clan of the 'Ndrangheta
edges.context: Piserà 'ndrina is a sub-group of the 'Ndrangheta.

edges.evidence_quote: they are allied with the Mancuso 'ndrina
Since the 1990s, they are in a feud with the La Rosa 'ndrina
edges.context: Piserà 'ndrina and La Rosa 'ndrina are in a feud.

edges.evidence_quote: On 29 June 1984 an operation was concluded which arrested 40 people attributable to the following 'ndrine: Mancuso, Pesce , Fiammingo, Fazzari and Piserà.
edges.context: Piserà 'ndrina and Pesce 'ndrina were both targeted in the same 1984 operation, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: On 29 June 1984 an operation was concluded which arrested 40 people attributable to the following 'ndrine: Mancuso, Pesce , Fiammingo, Fazzari and Piserà.
edges.context: Piserà 'ndrina and Fiammingo 'ndrina were both targeted in the same 1984 operation, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.context: Piserà 'ndrina and Fazzari 'ndrina were both targeted in the same 1984 operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
